projects.title: Impedance-transforming synchronous rectifier for EV
projects.description: Impedance-transforming synchronous rectifier enabling single-stage output power control for LCC-resonant EV wireless charging receivers.

projects.title: Machine Learning Based Magnetic Field Focusing
projects.description: Implementing magnetic field focusing in three-dimensional space using machine learning.

projects.title: Optimal Planar Transformer Design Based on Reinforcement Learning
projects.description: Finding optimal planar transformer design using reinforcement learning.

projects.title: Grid-Forming Inverter Islanding Detection Method
projects.description: Developing a grid-forming inverter islanding detection method by reactive power injection.

projects.title: MVDC/MVAC Converter Station
projects.description: MVDC/MVAC Converter station for railway system. Comparative analysis of AC/DC and DC/DC converter stations.

projects.title: Non-Isolated Modular Multilevel Converter
projects.description: A non-isolated step-down (NISD) DC transformer based on discontinuous conduction mode (DCM).
